---
title: 'Men''s night 11.05.15'
date: '2015-11-06T03:05:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5066467309918580210'
blogger_filename: '/2015/11/mens-night-110515.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Jace Robertson is funny!<br />
<br />
His platform is that of a story telller.<br />
<br />
Surrender. What does that mean practically to me daily?<br />
<br />
I surrendered (stopped running) on 08.08.2002, but do we ever dully surrender on this earth? So I ask myself, how can I surrender more?<br />
<br />
90% of my life is lived for me, if I'm honest. So I stoppex running, and I surrensered in that way. I surrenxered to so,e of his &nbsp;al,ing, not the other, and i don't understand tje rest.<br />
<br />
<br />
&nbsp;Storytelling, music and sound, computers, information, ... still selfish. Thinking of my &nbsp;calling is still thinking of me.<br />
<br />
how can i love my wife and kids ? surrender daily to diet, choices, etc...<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
